error.invalid_zip: Pack is not a valid ZIP file: {error}
error.missing_manifest: Pack is missing manifest.json at root
error.invalid_id: Invalid or missing 'id': must match pattern ^[a-z0-9]+(\.[a-z0-9]+)+$
error.invalid_version: Invalid or missing 'version': must be semver x.y.z
error.entry_file_missing: Entry file not found in pack: entry.{key}
error.optional_entry_missing: Optional entry file specified but missing: entry.{key}
error.platform_version: Pack requires platform version {required}, but current platform is {current}
error.zip_bomb: Pack extraction would exceed size limit (possible ZIP bomb)
